# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

Prevent kong no auth.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"

services:
  - name: service1
    url: http://service1.local
    routes:
      - name: route1
        paths:
          - /service1
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth

  - name: service2
    url: http://service2.local
    routes:
      - name: route2
        paths:
          - /service2
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth

upstreams:
  - name: service1-upstream
    targets:
      - target: service1-1.local:80
      - target: service1-2.local:80
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: /
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3

  - name: service2-upstream
    targets:
      - target: service2-1.local:80
      - target: service2-2.local:80
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: /
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
      hide_credentials: true
